programme.desc: One man prepares for life behind bars after running someone down with his car; another man must be placed in isolation for his own protection, after being accused of knowingly giving women HIV.

programme.title: Lockup: Savannah: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The Chatham County Detention Center hosts an inmate who faces a life sentence for murdering his spouse; another inmate's illegal business stands in the way of him graduating from the jail's strict substance abuse program.

programme.title: Lockup: Savannah: Extended Stay
programme.desc: One inmate is tested when he returns to general population after spending months in the segregation unit; another inmate vows to do damage because he feels like an outcast.

programme.title: Lockup: Savannah: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A jail program attempts to save shelter dogs from being put down; an Army veteran must face his own demons; pregnant and charged with murder, one inmate must decide whether to turn in a family member to save herself.

programme.title: Lockup: Cincinnati: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A jailhouse assault leads to one bloody inmate, and two sides to the story; another inmate makes a daring escape; one of the jail's most violent inmates decides it's time for a change.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Extractions provide some of the most dramatic interactions that ever occur between inmates and staff, and few extractions in the state of Colorado have provided more drama than the ones involving Roy Slagle.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: One reality of prison is that there's never a shortage of pain, and at the Limon Correctional Facility in Colorado, there's enough left over for the visitors as well; drama unfolds as a father and son try to reconcile a violent past.

programme.title: Lockup: Colorado: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Even for inmates serving hard time, love can be a strong motivator; in prison, reaching out to others can be a dicey proposition; some inmates just don't know when someone's getting too close until it's too late.

programme.title: Lockup: Tampa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A surprise attack on a sheriff's deputy takes an unexpected turn, a convicted rapist loses his cool in court and an accused murderer in a high profile case tries to cash in on her notoriety.

programme.title: Lockup: Tampa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A convict finds that jail offers a chance for revenge, a former stripper fears losing her daughter and you'll get a "taste" of Tampa behind bars.

programme.title: Lockup: Tampa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An inmate with suspicious tax forms becomes a problem for the jail, and a murder ends with the victim burned alive in a dumpster, pitting friends and family against each other.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 4
programme.desc: Rohan calls over Koichi to help him fight off Cheap Trap, which has attached itself onto Rohan’s back. Unfortunately, Koichi thinks Rohan is pulling a prank on him and leaves.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bites the Dust, Part 1
programme.desc: Kosaku Kawajiri is forced to kill Hayato after the boy threatens to expose him as a killer. To make matter worse, Kosaku learns from his father, Yoshihiro, that Rohan and the others are coming to investigate the Kawajiri family shortly.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bites the Dust, Part 2
programme.desc: Yoshikage Kira gains a new ability called Bites the Dust, a bomb that automatically kills anyone who tries to discover Kira’s identity through Hayato. Realizing that the only people who could stop Kira are ones with similar powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shining D (Diamond) is Unbreakable, Part 1
programme.desc: Hayato’s attempt to kill Kira using Stray Cat’s air bullet ends in failure. Kira realizes that letting Hayato repeat the same morning is becoming a risk, so he decides to undo Bites the Dust after he sees through Rohan’s death.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shining D (Diamond) is Unbreakable, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and Hayato hide inside a nearby residence to escape from Deadly Queen and Stray Cat’s attack. But to their horror, Kira is somehow able to close in on them from outside the house.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Goodbye, Morioh – The Heart of Gold
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends have finally cornered Yoshikage Kira. Refusing to give up, Kira tries to activate Bites the Dust one more time to escape his desperate situation. Can Josuke and the others stop Kira in time to save the future of Morioh?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind
programme.desc: Amid the gritty beauty of Neapolis, the Joestar lineage lives on in Giorno Giovanna. After sidestepping long-term Joestar ally Koichi Hirose, Giorno must contend with two powerful Mafia gangsters, Leaky Eye Lucca and the enigmatic Bruno Bucciarati.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Eager to identify Leaky Eye Luca’s attacker, Bucciarati confronts Giorno and unleashes a Stand attack to dismantle him piece by piece. But Giorno counters with his Stand Golden Wind, surprising not just his adversary, but also himself.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Meet the Gangster Behind the Wall
programme.desc: Determined to join the mafia gang Passione, altruistic Giorno is introduced by Bucciarati to the grotesquely corpulent Polpo, an incarcerated capo who tests Giorno’s loyalty with a simple but bizarrely lethal test involving a lighter and its flame.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Plodding amid the dusky shadows of a peaceful piazza is Polpo’s macabre Stand, which assails any who dare witness the reigniting of the lighter. Giorno deciphers its method of attack, but is soon staring death in the face as Koichi comes to his aid.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Find Polpo's Fortune!
programme.desc: While word of the high-ranking capo Polpo’s alleged suicide sparks astonishment and speculation in the crime syndicate Passione, Giorno is inducted into Bucciarati’s eclectic mafia family. The only problem now is the vast fortune seemingly up for grabs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Sailing to the Isle of Capri to recover Polpo’s estate, Bucciarati and team are ambushed by a stealthy enemy Stand that deflates them into rubber-like human pelts. Abbacchio, however, thinks he can find his comrades and reluctantly activates his Stand.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Having beheaded their captor by zipper, the team learns its plan has been leaked to Zucchero’s cohort, who is lying in wait on Capri. With fish and gun, Giorno and Mista swim to the island to beat the boat and weed out their assassin-in-waiting.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: As Mista closes in on Sale, all signs seem to point to an easy kill. If only it weren’t for the truck hurtling up a mountainous Capri road stuck to his hand or Sale’s power to freeze all objects, gunman Mista would be celebrating over his enemy’s corpse.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Within arm’s reach of Polpo’s fortune, Bucciarati and team meet the unassuming Pericolo, a capo who has come to accept the treasure. In presenting the loot, Bucciarati is bestowed not only the rank of capo but also an immense duty: protect Trish Una.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hitman Team
programme.desc: After an encounter with the Hitman Team’s Formaggio, Narancia is left wondering why the world is quickly transforming around him. Narancia hunts down his assailant with a hail of bullets as Formaggio tries to understand his attacker’s tracking skills.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Narancia is unshakable as he uses firepower and CO2 detection to survive Formaggio’s body-shrinking attack. Even beneath a spider’s fangs inside Formaggio’s bottle, Narancia reveals not Trish’s whereabouts but the bullet holes his Stand has left behind.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno, Abbacchio and Fugo travel to Pompeii to find a hidden key pivotal in their protection of Trish. Facing the trio, however, is more than the lonely remains of ancient Roman villas and colonnades. Fugo spots an odd figure in an even stranger mirror.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Illuso has pulled Fugo into his mirror world as Abbacchio rushes to retrieve the key, despite Giorno’s stern advice. But Abbacchio cannot escape a similar fate, leaving him and later Giorno to resort to self-mutilation in favor of death by laceration.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Delve into the deadly battles that mold Giorno into an indispensable member of the Passione gang as he and his allies fight to protect Trish and themselves against outlandish acts of violence by members of the Hitman team.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ready to escort Trish by train, the gang finds on the platform a lone turtle lingering by the drinking fountain, just as the boss instructed. But Bucciarati is stumped—departure is imminent, the enemy is closing in, and the cryptic key appears useless.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and gang hide inside a turtle aboard their train hurtling toward Florence as Mista fights to keep Pesci's body-piercing fish hook from ensnaring his brain. Prosciutto, meanwhile, has released his Stand, rapidly aging everyone on board.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: To save his squad, Bucciarati risks all by grabbing hold of Prosciutto and hurling himself off the speeding train, only to be saved by Pesci’s hook. Now, as Pesci savagely fishes for his victim’s heart, Bucciarati’s resolve reaches stunning heights.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and crew head to Venice by car, after a near-death encounter with Pesci. Unbeknownst to them, Melone from the Hitman Team has created an atomizing ancillary Stand from Bruno’s blood and the body of an unsuspecting female train passenger.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno fights transmutation with transmutation as he weaponizes his own severed hand and imbues inanimate objects with life against Melone’s baby Stand. Giorno and team now must learn that the road ahead to Santa Lucia train station is paved with ice.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ghiaccio's Stand, White Ice is able to envelop him like a bodysuit and able to freeze everything around him to extremely low temperatures. Giorno and Mista somewhat make it to Venice, despite being partially frozen by Ghiaccio...

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: By revealing to each other a fearless embrace of the unknown, Giorno and Mista emerge victorious against Ghiaccio. Now, a single member of Bruno’s group must face a single bell tower, a single elevator shaft, and a single menacing task.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 4
programme.desc: Rohan calls over Koichi to help him fight off Cheap Trap, which has attached itself onto Rohan’s back. Unfortunately, Koichi thinks Rohan is pulling a prank on him and leaves.

programme.desc: Hayato’s attempt to kill Kira using Stray Cat’s air bullet ends in failure. Kira realizes that letting Hayato repeat the same morning is becoming a risk, so he decides to undo Bites the Dust after he sees through Rohan’s death.

programme.desc: Josuke and Hayato hide inside a nearby residence to escape from Deadly Queen and Stray Cat’s attack. But to their horror, Kira is somehow able to close in on them from outside the house.

programme.desc: Josuke and his friends have finally cornered Yoshikage Kira. Refusing to give up, Kira tries to activate Bites the Dust one more time to escape his desperate situation. Can Josuke and the others stop Kira in time to save the future of Morioh?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper and Anita Manning travel through Yorkshire. Along the way, David learns about a 500-year-old mystery and Anita meets two inspirational Land Girls before they head towards the auction in Harrogate.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: After a successful last auction, David Harper has the lead, but Anita Manning is hot on his heels as they shop in Yorkshire and County Durham before heading into Newcastle for the auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the penultimate leg for antiques hunters Anita Manning and David Harper. Starting in Northumberland, England, and crossing the border into Scotland, they search for hidden gems before heading to auction in Kinbuck, Stirlingshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper and Anita Manning travel to the Isle of Bute, Glasgow and Renfewshire. They both take a massive risk in a bid to win the week, but who will come out on top when they head to the auction in Paisley?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A new pair of auctioneers, Philip Serrell and Natasha Raskin, take to the open road in search for treasure. On their first day, they travel through Wales and end at an auction in Llanelli, Carmarthenshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques hunters Philip Serrell and Natasha Raskin take in the delights of South West Wales before crossing into England and heading to an auction in Newent, Gloucester.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Natasha Raskin shop in Hertfordshire, Oxfordshire and Buckinghamshire before heading to West London for a crucial auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin is playing catch up as she and fellow auctioneer Philip Serrell take a trip around Sussex and Kent before heading to their penulitimate auction in Rayleigh, Essex.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the last day for Natasha Raskin and Philip Serrell, and they cover Berkshire and Hampshire. But who will win at the final auction in Salisbury?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Mark Stacey begin their adventure in Kent. Along the way, Thomas visits the life-saving underground world of Ramsgate, and Mark finds out about the science behind a lighthouse in Dover.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Mark Stacey and Thomas Plant continue their trip through the Kent countryside. Mark is trailing behind, but can he catch Thomas when they head to an auction in Paddock Wood?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Thomas Plant and Mark Stacey are halfway through their road trip, and they shop in Essex and Suffolk before making their way to an auction in Cambridge.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Mark Stacey hunt for antiques across East Anglia. Along the way, Thomas hears the inspiring story of a pioneering nurse and Mark learns the incredible history of a Dunwich lost to the waves.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the last leg for antiques experts Mark Stacey and Thomas Plant as they travel through Norfolk. With less than £30 separating them, the pressure's on as they head to their final auction in Oakham, Rutland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a special episode of Antiques Roadshow commemorating the 80th anniversary of the Battle of Britain and the Blitz.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and experts from BBC1's popular Antiques Roadshow turn sleuth as they explore intriguing stories behind family heirlooms. Hilary Kay investigates a rare artifact that's said to have adorned Oliver Cromwell's funeral procession.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Diamond Jubilee
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the Antiques Roadshow team are in a celebratory mood with this special edition marking the Queen's diamond jubilee. Guests arrive at Kensington Palace to record their stories of royal encounters with the Queen in a moving tribute.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Special
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a special edition of Antiques Roadshow, as the team heads to Stratford-upon-Avon in search of treasures at Charlecote Park. With Shakespeare's home close by, they search for objects from the days of Elizabethan England.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Paul Atterbury investigates a sampler and the heart-wrenching tale of the incarceration of its creator in a Victorian workhouse.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: John Foster and the team investigate two remarkable trophies that record great British moments of athletic endeavour.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Paul Atterbury investigates the mystery that surrounds a portrait of Tina Strobos, a member of the Dutch resistance during the 2nd World War.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Andy McConnell helps a daughter to discover the truth about her father's working life at the Whitefriars Glass factory.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Judith Miller pieces together the poignant story of a housemaid who was forced to give up her baby for adoption.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Hilary Kay investigates a rare medal and reveals the details of an extraordinary act of bravery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce investigates the story of a holocaust survivor and visits the Nazi concentration camp, Bergen Belsen. 70 years after the liberation of the camp by the British Army, Fiona organises an emotional meeting.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Marc Allum investigates the story of the Carpathia, the ship that went to the rescue of the Titanic survivors, and brings together two of the Captain's relatives.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Geoffrey Munn investigates the history of a ring that comes from perhaps the most explosive time in British history; the trial of Charles I.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Paul Atterbury investigates the role of the Medway Queen in the Dunkirk evacuation and takes a Grandson to visit his Grandfather's ship for the first time.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Will Farmer investigates the life of a talented but little known sculptor. Does any of his work survive and if so can Will help the artist's family to trace it?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Adam Schoon investigates one of the most incredible adventure stories of all time led by one of the biggest names in exploration, Sir Ernest Shackleton.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Hilary Kay investigates a tiny Victorian sketchbook but who was the artist and how did he come to lose what must have been a treasured possession?

programme.title: Cats Uncovered
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin and some of the world's leading cat experts reveal the wild sides of domestic cats; with GPS trackers and cameras, they discover how a cat can transform from pampered pet to purring predator.

programme.title: Cats Uncovered
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin and a team of scientists reveal the secret language of domestic cats, the surprising conversations they have when their owners are asleep, and why they meow at humans but not each other.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Dogs
programme.desc: Martin Clunes delves into the world of man's best friend, the dog.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Dogs
programme.desc: Martin Clunes delves into the world of man's best friend, the dog.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Dogs
programme.desc: Martin Clunes delves into the world of man's best friend, the dog.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Dogs
programme.desc: Martin Clunes delves into the world of man's best friend, the dog.

programme.title: Pets: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Take a deep dive into animal playtime and see how many of these activities are really learning opportunities in disguise; find out why hamsters love to run in a wheel, how dogs bone up on pack rules and the real meaning behind a rabbit's hop.

programme.title: Pets: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Extraordinary photography reveals the hidden senses and secret communication skills of animals.

programme.title: Elephant Diaries
programme.desc: A rescue team tries to save a starving orphaned elephant rejected by the rest of the herd; Michaela Strachan meets 2-year-old herd leader Wendi; Jonathan Scott tries to win over Emily, the matriarch of the older elephants.

programme.title: Elephant Diaries
programme.desc: Michaela Strachan follows preparations to move Wendi and five older babies to a new release site; Jonathan Scott keeps an eye on Emily and the 30 larger orphans as they come face to face with Dika and a herd of wild elephants.

programme.title: Elephant Diaries
programme.desc: Wendi and her charges struggle to settle in Ithumba; the older female orphans are separated from Emily's herd; back in Nairobi, the remaining baby elephants must cope without Wendi.

programme.title: Animal Babies
programme.desc: The great plains of Africa are home to some of the most iconic animals on the planet. Growing up here means safari babies face immense challenges that will really test them.

programme.title: Animal Babies
programme.desc: Many animals that live in water come on land to have their babies. Being born this way presents some major challenges for water babies to overcome. For some, simply getting to water in the first place can be the biggest trial of their young lives.

programme.title: Homegrown Tastes South Africa
programme.desc: Lorna meets her good friend, model Blue Mbombo, in her home province of the Free State.

programme.title: Homegrown Tastes South Africa
programme.desc: Lorna meets petrol-head and comedian Mpho Popps in Soweto.

programme.title: Homegrown Tastes South Africa
programme.desc: Lorna Maseko meets a feast of local foodies, from celebrities to incredible chefs.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The series starts in autumnal Bordeaux. Rick arrives just in time to judge a local wine contest, and hires a 2CV for an excursion to the coast - abundant with mussels and oysters.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein enjoys a winter break in Reykjavik in search of the perfect cod and sampling succulent fjord-reared roast lamb.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick enjoys a weekend in Berlin, where history and the avant garde dwell enticingly side by side. A city that once made history with its divisive wall teems today with an overwhelming array of innovative chefs offering delicious seasonal creations.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Vienna, the city that once ran the Austro-Hungarian Empire. It is home to comfort dishes like tafelspitz and goulash, and it also gave its name to one of Europe's most popular dishes, the wiener schnitzel.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that it's known as the stomach of Italy. He learns how to make the local fresh egg pasta used for tortellini, tagliatelle, ravioli and lasagne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Lisbon on the banks of the River Tagus, a city in love with its seafood and possibly the best custard tarts in the world. The culinary effects of Portugal's historic explorations are still seen in its dishes.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After losing his rookie partner in the mysterious rescue of what he thinks is a ghost, Eddie gets unwittingly caught up in a 70-year-old legend. Meanwhile, Hobie attempts to help a friend find a new home for her dog.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A local restaurateur puts up a $25,000 bounty for the largest shark caught during the weekend's Shark Derby he's sponsoring. To attract more sharks, he illegally chums the waters, drawing hundreds of sharks uncommonly close to shore.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cort promises to come up with $10,000 for a nursing home, but he needs Mitch and Craig's help to compete in a water-skiing race with a big cash prize. Shauni’s traumatic fear of the ocean after Jill’s death threatens her future with Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig, Mitch, and Garner go for a weekend hang-gliding trip, but Mitch has a serious accident, and ends up facing death before the fangs of a rattlesnake! Cort reacquaints himself with a woman who has a shocking secret.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Baywatch lifeguard Megan is attacked on the beach, she struggles to regain her confidence – unaware that her attacker, a fisherman, views her as the "One That Got Away." Meanwhile, Shauni suffers from lifeguard burnout.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Mitch makes a heroic ocean rescue while working at her private beach party, a Hollywood producer offers Mitch the starring role in a movie. Meanwhile, Harvey and Shauni hold a wild bikini contest to raise money for an aquatic rescue group.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After helping break up a gang fight on the beach, Eddie gets the idea of having some gang members join the lifeguard W.A.T.E.R. program designed to help troubled youths.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Baywatch lifeguards gain insight into the plight of the homeless when Hobie befriends a girl who's living on the streets. Eddie is attacked by a former mental patient known as “Hector the Collector.”

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie goes on a blind date with Nicole, who turns out to be morbidly overweight, which leads to complications and an unlikely friendship. But Nicole's diet pills prove life-threatening. Meanwhile, Mitch’s life is comically disrupted by a stray dog.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Jimmy se debate entre la familia y el trabajo después de que su suegro, Ed, le pide que manipule las pruebas de la actual investigación de asesinato del NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Director Vance es notificado por el Pentágono que el submarino nuclear Gibbs y Bishop están a bordo para llevar a cabo una investigación de asesinato ha quedado radio en silencio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Torres confía en las habilidades de investigación de su equipo después de que se despierta en un barco de pesca en ruinas, cubierto de sangre e incapaz de recordar las últimas 12 horas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de un bloqueo de un tirador activo en un hospital naval, el equipo del NCIS busca a un sospechoso que huyó de la escena.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un hombre que vivía una doble vida con dos familias. Al mismo tiempo, Anthony lucha con la decisión de ayudar a Erin a investigar a su antiguo compañero, a quien ella sospecha de robar dinero de drogas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que el cuñado de Danny, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se enreda con la mafia y roba su tarjeta de crédito, Danny obliga a Jimmy a enfrentarse a los mafiosos con la ayuda de Baez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer se queja de que la NYPD no ha encontrado al asesino de su hijo, Danny reabre el caso. Esto molesta al detective original, Erin, y a Anthony, que lo habían dejado de lado por falta de pruebas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se apresuran a encontrar a una niña desaparecida que morirá en 72 horas sin su medicación para el corazón.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las hijas de Bruce Morrison, una escritor cuya esposa desapareció misteriosamente el año pasado, desaparecen en el aniversario de la desaparición de su madre, el BAU debe estudiar a Morrison como un posible sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Austin para investigar a las víctimas encontradas allí con sus relojes a la hora equivocada, una pista que puede conectar los delitos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de un bloqueo de un tirador activo en un hospital naval, el equipo del NCIS busca a un sospechoso que huyó de la escena.

programme.title: United Shades of America

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/22/2016. What’s it like living off the grid? W. Kamau Bell travels to North Carolina and Tennessee to see what it takes.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/29/2016. Kamau visits people in Portland, Oregon, to discover how hipsters and gentrification have affected their neighborhoods.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist leads officers on a low-speed chase, a motorist who led police on a dangerous chase feigns ignorance, and a couple's date ends with a totaled car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A neighborhood search ends with the suspect in a stranger's home, a pastor calls about a suspicious car parked behind his church, and a deputy gives advice to a young mother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a man who attempted to cash a bad check then fled the scene. Police are called when a man’s ex-girlfriend breaks into his house. Police chase an unlicensed teen speeding in a vehicle

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police search for a passenger who fled from a traffic stop, a driver not wearing a seatbelt finds himself in more trouble, and detectives respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it’s better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon’s true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers tackle a man carrying other people's credit cards, two women deny ownership of drug paraphernalia found in their bags, and police mediate a father-son dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police help a man evacuate a house fire, a high-speed chase yields only minor infractions, and an officer interrogates a parolee with meth in his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover officers set up a sting operation to nab people looking to buy drugs. A woman tries to conceal drugs in her mouth. Then a repeat offender who has a history of threatening officers with a tainted needle is arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: 51 kilos of cocaine are found on a semi-truck during a traffic stop. A man on a bike tosses meth and weed as he flees into the woods. A woman uses a fire extinguisher to damage her girlfriend's door.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Oklahoma man's effort to evade units goes up in flames, officers use a beanbag gun on an armed suspect, and deputies intervene in a couple's grocery dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot two suspects on a city bus and a prolonged standoff occurs. A wanted man's friends lie to Deputies about his whereabouts. Deputies find meth in a one-armed man's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies chase a wanted man who makes a break for it, a man leads officers on a vehicle pursuit, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects who were believed to have been involved in a robbery. Police attend to a man who has injected a concerning amount of methamphetamine. Officers break up a fight in progress involving two men outside a convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted suspect tries to hide from officers, a woman calls deputies to apprehend her hostile husband, and a passenger tries to outrun the police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: D.B. Russell's granddaughter was kidnapped in last season's finale cliffhanger and now he leads the CSI team on a hunt to find her, on the 13th season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs arrive at their favorite diner only to discover a gruesome crime scene with eight dead victims and a lot of questions.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a girl is shot and killed at a large rave in the desert, the CSI team has to search for clues, find her missing friend and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a famed music historian is murdered and left in a piano, it has an emotional effect on Sanders, who had a past with her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a K-9 is blamed for the death of his partner, the CSI team discovers there's more to the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Things get personal when D.B. Russell is drawn into the investigation of the death of his son's basketball coach.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a reverend who was killed at the grave site of former CSI Warrick Brown.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five bodies are found in what appears to be a meteor site in the middle of the desert, CSI Finlay recognizes one of the casualties, prompting her to revisit her past.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team lends a hand to local law enforcement on the strip with several arrests until a John Doe is found in a car. Also, things become personal for Captain Brass when he discovers some facts about his daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five people are killed in a small plane crash a mile off the Vegas strip, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a prominent news anchor during a live broadcast.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs need to ace the case involving a rising tennis star. Meanwhile, the CSIs are surprised to hear Hodges is engaged to an Italian bombshell.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When CSI Mac Taylor decides to surprise his girlfriend in Vegas, he discovers she's missing and asks his friend D.B. Russell for help. Gary Sinise of CSI:NY guest stars.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a famous Cuban singer's sister who's in town as part of a U.S. tour.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un brutal asesinato por parte de una banda de motociclistas tiene lugar en un bar de motocicletas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un botín de fichas perdidas de un casino cerrado aparece en Las Vegas y le sigue una serie de asesinatos, lo que lleva a Langston a usar la fuerza letal por primera vez en su carrera como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El destino de Sara sigue siendo una incógnita mientras el equipo de CSI se apresura a averiguar si ha sobrevivido al ataque del asesino en miniatura, en el estreno de la octava temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos inusuales. La muerte de un conductor de go-carts cuyo cuerpo decapitado se encuentra a metros de la carretera por la que corría, y el misterioso asesinato en un restaurante donde los clientes cenan en la oscuridad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de toda una familia, excepto el de una hija que supuestamente está poseída por el diablo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren a un joven estrangulado hasta morir ahorcado ...cuyo cuerpo parece el de una mujer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra entre bastidores en un estudio de cine porno de terror para investigar el asesinato de una actriz de cine slasher asesinada en el plató de una de sus películas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En la primera parte de un episodio crossover de dos partes que concluirá en Without A Trace, una víctima de secuestro de Nueva York que desapareció hace seis años puede ser el mismo chico cuya muerte Grissom y el equipo de CSI están investigando.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio is called to the Miami West Detention Center to investigate a murdered inmate, he ends up witnessing three inmates escape.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a young model is killed by a hit and run driver, Horatio investigates the car's owner, who claims he loaned it out to the guests at his party.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man harpooned to his yacht leads Horatio into the world of modern-day treasure hunting and the massive greed that goes along with it.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tennis phenom Lana Walker is taken from her bedroom in the night and the only evidence they have to go on is a purple fiber found in the window frame.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a former rape victim is beaten to within inches of her life, Horatio must enter the world of prisons and parolees to find the culprit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a robbery/homicide leaves two men dead and a third still alive, Horatio is determined to find out what really happened.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton is trying to drive out of the hurricane's fury when he kills a man in the blinding storm and is now accused of vehicular manslaughter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A gas man is engulfed in invisible flames and dies all of which happens during a qualifying race at the Grand Prix Americas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finally closes the case of his brother's murder. He is reunited with Suzie, a former drug user who was involved with his brother.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a woman is witnessed being attacked by a shark, the CSIs learn that she was murdered prior to being dumped in the water.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young woman is thrown over the railing of a parking garage, the investigation into her death uncovers evidence that she was killed before the fall.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a plastic surgery anesthesiologist is found dead from an apparent suicide, Horatio thinks that this could be a case of murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A diamond broker is shot to death in a parking garage, a mentally disabled man witnessed the murder and wants to help Horatio solve the crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man, Juan Marco Varon, who may or may not have tortured Cuban refuges is murdered, the CSIs are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la hija de la terapeuta de Delko es asesinada, Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben encontrar al asesino antes de que los secretos más oscuros de Delko salgan a la luz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un salvaje doble asesinato en los Everglades hace que Horatio y el equipo de CSI se enfrenten a la fuerza bruta de la propia mafia rusa de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en la boutique de moda más moderna de Miami, Horatio descubre que la inestabilidad de Julia la ha convertido en una bomba de tiempo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una grúa de 60 metros se estrella contra un rascacielos de Miami, pone en peligro a Calleigh y Delko y acaba con la esperanza de Horatio de atrapar a un famoso jefe del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran a un hombre esposado y apuñalado en su habitación de hotel, mientras que una broma en el laboratorio provoca una ruptura en el equipo de CSI y amenaza su investigación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un asesino secuestra a un inocente bebé, Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben encontrarlo antes de que el niño se convierta en su próxima víctima.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un salvaje asesino anda desenfrenado en Miami, Horatio debe intervenir para evitar que un miembro de la fuerza policial se acerque demasiado al caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un tirador apunta al motel donde se aloja Delko, Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar el pasado de Delko para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI, con la ayuda de informantes locales, lucha para salvar un vecindario que está a punto de ser dominado por una violenta pandilla callejera.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI usan tecnología radical para descubrir el secreto de la mente de un hombre cuando este aparece cubierto de sangre sin recordar dónde ha estado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando ocurre un asesinato durante una carrera de caballos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI descubren que Ryan tiene un vínculo personal con el caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx Woods regresa a Miami cuando un asesino pone en peligro la vida de Calleigh y Ryan. Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI enfrentan cara a cara a un abogado defensor que puede o no estar involucrado en el encubrimiento de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando unos piratas se apoderan de un yate de lujo, el futuro de Delko como CSI se ve amenazado justo cuando su relación con Calleigh pasa al siguiente nivel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When transferring Robert Dunbrook's son from prison to court, the NYPD is ambushed by a group of professional kidnappers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: One CSI New York team member's life is changed forever in a significant way following the aftermath of a shooting incident.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team is tracking a cyber-killer who is currently threatening the lives of several medical healthcare workers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: This week the CSI New York team is hunting for a serial killer who is equipped with an incredibly deadly sense of direction.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators discovers DNA that contradicts a murder case that was seemingly open and shut before.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators is called in to investigate the very recent murder of an underground hip-hop dancer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a software executive, the CSIs are exposed to the underground world of food splooshing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Las Vegas CSI Ray Langston comes to New York to help Mac and the CSI team try and save a hostage from a human trafficking ring.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators resumes their hunt for the Compass Killer after a body falls from the 59th street bridge.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In the culmination of a multi-episode mystery, the CSI New York team of investigators uncovers the dark lair of the Compass Killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team follows up on a 911 call to a vacant penthouse but finds a nearly 100-Year-Old corpse and a booby-trapped house.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A reformed drug addict is found dead in an alley and the CSI New York team discovers he was the victim of a premeditated plot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a brutal stabbing, they discover that evidence at the crime scene was planted which pits them against a trusted colleague.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the lingerie league is found murdered in a hot tub, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juicio apresurado (S5 Ep13)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe armar un rompecabezas humano cuando las partes del cuerpo amputadas de un querido entrenador de lucha se encuentran enterradas en toda la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Ella no está ahí (S5 Ep14)
programme.desc: Encuentran a un turista ruso muerto a puñaladas y el equipo de CSI se enfrenta cara a cara con la aterradora realidad de la trata de personas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La fiesta terminó (S5 Ep15)
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver del alcalde cae del techo en una recaudación de fondos de caridad, Stella y su cita se encuentran en medio de la escena del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Ninguna buena acción (S5 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando a un buitre que vuela sobre Manhattan se le cae un globo ocular humano de la garra, comienza la carrera para encontrar el cuerpo al que pertenece.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Parque verde (S5 Ep17)
programme.desc: Una bomba casera destruye una casa de Manhattan y valiosas evidencias, lo que obliga al equipo de CSI a ser creativo en la reconstrucción de las pruebas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Punto sin retorno (S5 Ep18)
programme.desc: Encuentran asesinado a un ex médico forense y un polvo blanco hallado en el lugar le brinda al equipo de CSI una importante pista para rastrear al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Error de comunicación (S5 Ep19)
programme.desc: Cuando un jefe indígena de EE. UU. recibe un disparo, el equipo de CSI lucha por traducir cuál de los varios sospechosos extranjeros pudo haber causado su muerte.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Presa (S5 Ep20)
programme.desc: Mientras investiga la muerte a tiros de un hombre en un teatro vacío, Stella se da cuenta de que la escena del crimen es extrañamente familiar y planeada.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Pasado, presente y homicidio (S5 Ep21)
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre muere al caer del piso 52 y su cuerpo desaparece después de tocar el suelo, el equipo de CSI debe tratar este caso como la desaparición de una persona.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Aniversario luctuoso (S5 Ep22)
programme.desc: La subasta de joyas más exclusiva del año termina abruptamente cuando asesinan a un tasador durante el evento. Hay un cambio emocional en la investigación.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Un bien mayor (S5 Ep23)
programme.desc: Mac le informa a un ex convicto que cumplió condena por un crimen que no cometió y Anna le dice a Danny que es hora de que nazca el primer bebé del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La verdad me engaña (S5 Ep24)
programme.desc: Stella descubre que los neoyorquinos están siendo asesinados por artefactos griegos antiguos, ella entrega su placa para seguir una pista que la lleva a Grecia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Págale (S5 Ep25)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Epílogo (S6 Ep 1)
programme.desc: La vida de un miembro del equipo de CSI de Nueva York cambia para siempre de manera significativa después de un tiroteo.

programme.title: El regreso del hombre llamado Caballo

programme.title: ¡Agáchate, maldito!

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: La Vida No Vale Nada
programme.desc: Con una perspectiva un poco fatalista sobre la naturaleza humana y la búsqueda de la felicidad a través del amor, Pablo experimenta de manera cínica algunas relaciones sin éxito.

programme.title: La agonía de ser madre
programme.desc: Gravemente enferma, una mujer pide a Dios que le dé vida para solucionar todos los problemas que provocó el alcoholismo de su esposo y sacar a su familia adelante.

programme.title: Rosario
programme.desc: Una mujer mata accidentalmente a su marido mientras actuaba en una obra de teatro.

programme.title: Un plan sencillo
programme.desc: Dos hermanos encuentran cuatro millones de dólares en una avioneta caída e intentan quedarse con el dinero, pero la paranoia, la codicia y el miedo a ser capturado hacen que su plan esté fuera de control, con consecuencias desastrosas.

programme.title: Los Intocables
programme.desc: El clásico enfrentamiento entre el bien y el mal, con Kevin Costner como el agente federal Eliot Ness, Robert De Niro como el jefe mafioso Al Capone y Sean Connery como Malone.

programme.title: Un asesino anda suelto
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie está suelto y ha secuestrado al hijo de un agente del FBI que lo persigue. Pero, ¿quién es el asesino? Una historia llena de emociones y sorpresas.

programme.title: En defensa del honor
programme.desc: Bruce Willis interpreta a un oficial encarcelado que se niega a abandonar su lucha contra los nazis, incluso desde detrás de las líneas de los enemigos.

programme.title: Hotel Rwanda
programme.desc: Cuando Paul Rusesabagina (Cheadle) ve que el mundo no va a intervenir en la masacre de la minoría tutsi, encuentra el coraje para abrir las puertas de su hotel a más de 1.200 refugiados.

programme.title: La verdad incómoda
programme.desc: Un llamado de atención que destruye mitos y malentendidos con el fin de transmitir el mensaje de que el calentamiento global es un peligro real. La verdad incómoda presenta el argumento persuasivo de Gore sobre que debemos actuar para salvar al planeta.

programme.title: Cómo termina
programme.desc: En esta comedia apocalíptica, Liza (Zoe Lister-Jones) hace un divertido viaje por Los Ángeles con la esperanza de llegar a la última fiesta antes del fin del mundo, y por el camino se encuentra con un variado elenco de personajes.

programme.title: Serendipity ES
programme.desc: En el transcurso de una noche mágica, Jonathan (John Cusack) y Sara (Kate Beckinsale) se conocen de manera inesperada, luego cada uno se va por su lado, dejando que el destino guíe su futuro, si es que se supone que terminen juntos.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Flirting With Disaster
programme.desc: Del director de American Hustle y Silver linings playbook llega esta ingeniosa comedia con un elenco de estrellas que examina las disfunciones de la vida familiar moderna.

programme.title: La mujer de mi hermano
programme.desc: Zoe e Ignacio llevan 10 años casados y la pasión se ha enfriado. Una Zoe sexualmente frustrada se siente físicamente atraída por su cuñado. Las cosas se complican aún más después de que ella queda embarazada y descubre que su esposo puede ser gay.

programme.title: Con Locura
programme.desc: Una universitaria británica se enamora de un estudiante estadounidense, del que debe separarse al ser expulsada del país por el vencimiento de su permiso.

programme.title: Bounce
programme.desc: Buddy (Ben Affleck) es un ejecutivo persuasivo que disfruta de una carrera de alto nivel. Cuando un giro del destino cambia todo, comienza a tener un amorío intenso con una viuda reciente llamada Abby (Gwyneth Paltrow).

programme.title: Cielo azul
programme.desc: Jessica Lange hace una interpretación ganadora de un premio "Óscar" como la atractiva e inestable mujer de un científico nuclear (Tommy Lee Jones) que se enfrenta a difíciles decisiones morales a raíz de las pruebas atmosféricas que debe llevar a cabo.

programme.title: La última pelea
programme.desc: La última pelea" narra la conmovedora e inspiracional historia de la familia Conlon, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) y Paddy (Nick Nolte), quienes encuentran redención en la arena al luchar para arreglarse a sí mismos y a su familia.

programme.title: Ojos de serpiente
programme.desc: En Atlantic City, un intento de asesinato lleva a un detective (Nicolas Cage) a investigar un caso de homicidio con 14.000 posibles sospechosos y una conspiración mortal en la que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Caza Terrorista
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage enciende un barril de pólvora de acción mientras un veterano agente de la CIA va a la caza de su némesis, un terrorista mortal.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: Respeto (2012)
programme.desc: Lucas comienza un romance con Jasmine sin saber que antes anduvo con Jacob, uno de sus amigos. Tras sentirse traicionado, Jacob delata a Lucas con el hermanastro de Jasmine y solo provoca la ira entre pandillas.

programme.title: CAOS
programme.desc: Dos policías, un novato (Phillippe) y un veterano de cabellos grises (Statham), persiguen a un hábil ladrón de bancos (Snipes).

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Visitantes
programme.desc: Espíritus malignos atormentan a una exitosa doctora (Kate del Castillo) y a su familia, haciendo que enloquezcan y desconfíen el uno del otro.

programme.title: Secuestro Express
programme.desc: Carla y Martín son una pareja secuestrada por tres hombres que pasan una noche aterradora en Caracas mientras esperan que el padre de Carla pague el rescate.

programme.title: La isla mínima
programme.desc: Se producen una serie de crímenes brutales contra chicas adolescentes en un paraje remoto del sur de España. Dos detectives, con personalidades contrapuestas, son designados para investigar.

programme.title: Complices
programme.desc: Un seductor experto lleva a su sobrino en un viaje a la playa en busca de mujeres calientes. Pero la única mujer capaz de causarle problemas, aparece allí.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Viernes 13
programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: Viernes 13: Parte 2
programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que había asesinado a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte 3

programme.desc: Después de su renacimiento en una morgue del hospital, el asesino de la máscara de hockey fija su atención vengativa en la familia Jarvis y un grupo de adolescentes hasta ahora despreocupados.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte V: un nuevo comienzo

programme.title: Viernes 13 parte VI: Jason vive

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece y su esposo se convierte en el principal sospechoso – especialmente después de que la policía encuentra una gran mancha de sangre en la alfombra de su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido agredida sexualmente y apuñalada hasta la muerte en la playa. Se descubrió un par de zapatos de tenis de hombre cerca de su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen era especialmente violenta: un esposo y una esposa fueron asesinados a tiros en su habitación. ¿Fue cómplice su hija de 16 años?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer muere mientras paseaba a sus perros por el bosque. Como no tenía enemigos y su marido tiene una coartada, la policía asume que fue un accidente de caza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s tired of being referred to as Kelly’s girlfriend and Blonde Emma – she’s not even blonde anymore! Determined to create a distinct university identity, Emma borrows some pot that was gifted to Kelly and smokes up with Becca and Gwyneth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli wants Johnny to like her, a lot. She worries she’s going to lose him to an older more “experienced” girl so to make sure she keeps her man close, Alli decides to play with the big kids at a ravine party.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Stress is at an all-time high at Degrassi with exams approaching and course selections due for next term.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Blue asks Holly J to the winter dance in a very romantic way. Only problem? Holly J thinks she might have a thing for her co-worker, Spinner. While Blue is a dreamboat, Spinner is a goofball.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Mia is offered a MAJOR modeling contract in Paris, Peter decides he’ll go with her. But he soon realizes he doesn’t fit into her sophisticated world.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Peter discovers his recreational drug was not-so-recreational meth, he swears he’ll never touch the stuff again. But with the reality of coming down, Peter realizes he just wants more.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Club Fair Day and Alli and Clare sign up for the Photography Club. Watch out Annie Leibovitz! Everyone who’s anyone is getting involved in something – except Johnny.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Spinner have been through so much together. They’re best friends. Jane’s just come out of a difficult year at home, so hanging out with Spinner is safe and… easy. That’s not a bad thing, right?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli insists she’s done with Johnny. When she breaks into his locker to steal nude photos of herself back, she, in fact, realizes that she’s so not over him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Holly J team up for a practicum business assignment and immediately bond over their idea to start a babysitting agency.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: News travels fast about Riley and Sam’s big fight. Riley doesn’t think much of it – until rumours start spreading that Sam was gay-bashed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Matchmaker week at Degrassi and Declan’s not interested in a serious relationship. The Diplomat brat is here for a good time, not a long time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Against all odds, Holly J has fallen for Declan. Suddenly she gets what everyone’s been so excited about for so long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s living the high school dream. The basketball team made it to the provincial finals, the Sports Awards Gala is coming up, and he finally has a mentor who gets him – Coach Carson.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s life is on the fast track. With the final basketball game approaching, the pressure is at an all-time high and Coach Carson has really taken KC under his wing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma and Kelly make a pit stop at Degrassi while on their Cross Country Bike Adventure raising awareness for their Re-Cycle project. Combining the great outdoors with her sexy boyfriend, Emma’s convinced she’s destined for the best summer ever.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s been a tough year for Peter. Mia’s departure, a brief meth problem, and the serious downgrade from lead singer to roadie.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya have been planning for their Spring Formal for as long as they can remember. It’s going to be magical.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Anya is more determined than ever to convince Sav they should be together – even if he is bringing family-friend and arranged-marriage-bride Farrah to the Spring Formal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Post-KC, Clare’s social life consists of building props for Declan’s musical and reading every book in the “Fortnight” vampire series. But when Clare has a sexy vampire dream about Declan, she’s shocked by her inner fantasy life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s completed anger management and has been named ‘Degrassi’s most eligible bachelor’. He’s been keeping his true feelings about guys under wraps – but he’s not sure he wants to anymore.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Holly J and Declan are closer than ever. They’ve made it through the year, Holly J’s applied for internships all over the city, and with exams almost done, all they need to worry about is Declan’s musical.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.
